tickets.title: Quantity Control button & Accordion behavior in Config Steps
tickets.body: Preserve expand/collapse state when navigating back to Step 1; fix (+/-) button active/inactive coloring in Step 4; fix quantity text color to black when set to 1 (currently shows gray); ensure only the first accordion section is expanded by default in Steps 3-5.

tickets.title: Labware/Additional Containers expand-collapse artifact
tickets.body: Remove the stray blue rectangle rendering at the top/bottom of the container when Labware and Additional Containers sections are expanded/collapsed; verify fix holds across both the Create-New-Configuration and Catalog entry flows.

tickets.title: Get Configuration query accepts invalid 'status' values
tickets.body: Add server-side validation so the status query param only accepts unlinked, inprogress, quoted (and comma-separated combinations); return a proper error for any other value instead of silently returning all configurations.

tickets.title: 'facilitiesSpecs' allows empty values on Create/Update
tickets.body: Add validation to reject empty values in facilitiesSpecs fields on both Create and Update product requests.

tickets.title: Update request returns 200 on malformed body
tickets.body: Add request-body validation on the Update Configuration endpoint so unrecognized/incorrect keys return a 400 Validation error instead of a silent 200 with unchanged data.

tickets.title: Previous button missing in Get Recommendation flow
tickets.body: Render the Previous button starting from the second question screen so users can navigate back and revise answers; keep Next button's disabled/enabled logic intact.

tickets.title: UI mismatches across Cryo Config Steps 2-5
tickets.body: Step 2: fix padding around 'Run Time Licenses' text, fix Alerts checkbox text alignment/typo, change checkbox font color to gray, remove stray separator line. Step 3: wrap 'Power/Electrical' text to 1 line, rename 'Structural components' section to 'Adapters' per Figma, remove trailing separator when collapsed. Step 4: fix checkbox font color, remove trailing separator. Step 5: rename second section to match Figma ('Adapters'), fix checkbox font color, un-invert the Operational/Performance Qualification checkboxes, remove trailing separator. Also restore 3D Configurator panel to cover half the screen in Steps 2-4.

tickets.title: Button state/color issues + carryover from POD2-167
tickets.body: Fix 'Configure this model' button background/text color, active/pressed states, and text sizing to match Figma; correct enable/disable logic so only CryoArc's button is enabled appropriately; align header text below Product Configuration; increase text size to match Figma. Carryover fixes: correct header 'Online' text color, keep model descriptions to one line in Model Selection, apply bold/semibold emphasis to model titles, fix 'View products' button text, and correct header/nav bar height/spacing.

tickets.title: Padding issues hiding Cryobox config data
tickets.body: Fix layout/padding so the selected configuration option, samples-per-box value, rack type info, and cryoboxes-needed value are all correctly positioned and fully visible on the card.

tickets.title: Info icon size/color mismatch
tickets.body: Resize the Information icon to match Figma dimensions and change its color from green to gray, consistently across the Catalog and 3D Panel entry points.

tickets.title: Storage Capacity section not reflecting usage
tickets.body: Fix data binding so the Storage Capacity section updates its usage value, progress bar, and percentage correctly after changes.

tickets.title: Edit/Delete buttons missing on Labware cards
tickets.body: Add the missing Edit and Delete buttons to all Labware cards so users can manage entries.

tickets.title: Admin Dashboard UI inconsistencies
tickets.body: Wrap DAU/WAU/MAU and Metric tooltip text to 2 lines instead of 1; resize DatePicker panel to match its button; align activity table rows with column headers; fix Date Filter button to a fixed size so it doesn't shift the Export button; wrap 'time period' text in the Configs Created metric card to 2 lines; correct the Configs Created chart tooltip shape and content (show 'Configs linked'/'Configs unlinked' values, remove month text); make the dashboard header/top nav sticky on scroll.

tickets.title: UI mismatches in labware/containers
tickets.body: Fix Labware item display styling; correct header fonts/styles and separator line color between Labware and Additional Containers sections; align Add button UI with Figma; fix empty-state panel styling for 'No labware configured' message; correct the disabled-state arrow color on the Next button.

tickets.title: Currency modal/summary screen padding & UI
tickets.body: Fix alignment of 'Optional sections not included' text below the last summary section; add the missing USD exchange-rate conversion display when a non-USD currency is selected; correct currency abbreviation text color (should be black, not gray) and fix font to match design mocks.
